content_body:
Dear owners, thanks for letting us use your cabin for the past three nights. Everyone loved your cabin. I even said in my head that I want to live in this cabin. We got to go the river but not everyone went to the river because, well, I don't know. But still, thanks for trusting us for using your cabin. We love it! 

Anonymous 8 year old
title: Thank You For Letting Us Use Your Cabin!
